allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/data/departements.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('type:', d.type\); console.log\('features:', d.features?.length\); console.log\('sample props:', JSON.stringify\(d.features?.[0]?.properties\)\); console.log\('sample geom type:', d.features?.[0]?.geometry?.type\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/data/communes_scores.json','utf8'\)\); const k=Object.keys\(s\)[0]; console.log\('sample key:', k\); console.log\('sample val:', JSON.stringify\(s[k]\).slice\(0,300\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/data/communes_scores.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Type:', typeof d\); console.log\('Keys count:', Object.keys\(d\).length\); const first=Object.entries\(d\)[0]; console.log\('First entry:', JSON.stringify\(first\).slice\(0,300\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('public/data/communes_geo.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Type:', d.type\); console.log\('Features count:', d.features?.length\); const f=d.features?.[0]; console.log\('First feature props:', JSON.stringify\(f?.properties\).slice\(0,200\)\); console.log\('First geometry type:', f?.geometry?.type\); console.log\('Coords sample length:', JSON.stringify\(f?.geometry?.coordinates\).length\)")
